component.name: Wayfinder
component.summary: Fast, native Linux file manager with a docked preview pane

description.p: Wayfinder is a keyboard-friendly Linux file manager built with a permanent side-by-side preview pane so you never lose context while browsing. Click an image to preview it inline, click an audio file to play it right in the panel, or click a text file to read the first few kilobytes — all without opening a separate app.

ul.li: Docked preview pane with inline image, audio, and text preview
Details and Icons view with adjustable zoom
Click-and-drag rubber-band multi-select for batch operations
Cut, copy, paste, rename, and permanent delete
Tabbed browsing — open multiple directories at once
Folder tree in the sidebar with collapsible sections
Dark theme with a compact, information-dense layout

screenshot.caption: Browse files with a docked preview pane

description.p: Initial release. Core file management, preview pane, tabbed browsing, audio playback, and rubber-band multi-select.
